reviews.comment:
Ordenado, cordial atención. Se me había quemado una lámpara de mi auto y tenían para la venta, en otra estación no había conseguido

(Translated by Google)
Organized, friendly service. One of my car's light bulbs had burned out and they had replacements for sale; I hadn't been able to find them at another station.
